title: OpenClaw_ReminderPipeline_Output
description: process_reminder_pipeline 返回的通知列表，供前端/UI层消费

type.description: 通知类型。WATER_UI_ALERT = 喝水弱提醒；MED_RINGING_ALERT = 吃药响铃；MED_URGE_LIGHT/HEAVY = 催促升级；MED_ESCALATION_CRITICAL = 三振出局；MED_DUPLICATE_BLOCK = 防重复拦截

time.description: 该通知代表的虚拟时间

message.description: 展示给用户的完整提示文本，含 emoji 前缀

med_id.description: 仅 MED 类通知附带，指向具体的药品事件 ID
